use_cases: Display structured content sections with header, body, and footer regions in dashboard or listing interfaces
Create product cards in e-commerce catalog layouts
Build article or blog post preview cards with title, description, and metadata
Compose dashboard widgets with consistent card styling across SaaS applications
Design pricing tier or feature highlight cards with customizable content areas
ai_summary: A modular card component system with five composable sub-components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) following Shadcn UI patterns. Features a minimalist flat design with subtle shadows and rounded borders. Ships as atomic primitives for maximum flexibility in building complex card-based layouts like dashboards, product catalogs, or article previews.
